system.description:
◇ *magical*, *loud*

When you **_blow the horn outside, at night,_** **_in the presence of the undead_**, the horn crumbles and a mist rises. The undead flee, and the Pale Hunter and his hounds soon appear to chase them.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.MCe2YgHD24ptZJrG]{The Pale Hunter}.*
